name: v1.0.0
body:
The first stable v1 release of Graphify.

## New Features
- Railpack build pack support as the successor to the old extractor
- Instance-level MCP server, toggleable from Settings > Advanced
- Watch-paths support for incremental graph updates

## Fixes
- Query results no longer flicker when streaming large graphs (#2001)
- Fixed graph.html failing to load for single-node repos (#2010)
- Deployment logs stopping mid-run

## Security Fixes
- Automatic PII/secret sanitization in exported graphs for tokens and URL passwords
- Stricter validation of file paths during extraction

## New Exports
- FalkorDB export target
- Obsidian vault export improvements

## Breaking Changes
- Removed the deprecated `graphify dump` command; use `graphify export json` instead

## Notes
- Railpack is currently in beta. Test it in a staging repo before switching from the old extractor.
